text:
vd          2009-03-27 06:54:19 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    sysutils/duplicity   Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
  Log:
  * Upgrade sysutils/duplicity from 0.5.09 to 0.5.12
  * Remove dependencies on pexpect/GnuPGInterface as they are both bundled
  * Fix some out-of-order plist entries
  
  ChangeLog:
  http://duplicity.nongnu.org/CHANGELOG
  
  PR:             ports/132908
  Submitted by:   Peter Schuller <peter.schuller@infidyne.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.24      +2 -12     ports/sysutils/duplicity/Makefile
  1.16      +3 -3      ports/sysutils/duplicity/distinfo
  1.10      +6 -3      ports/sysutils/duplicity/pkg-plist
